name: v07-stripe-webhook
description: v0.7 PR 4 flagship demo — declarative Stripe webhook routing. The trigger verifies the Stripe-Signature header (t=<ts>,v1=<hex> against STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, 300s tolerance, raw-body HMAC). Replay protection caches `body.id` for 5 minutes — Stripe retries on the same event return 200 with `{status: 'duplicate'}` and don't re-run the workflow. The single dispatch step uses POLYMORPHIC sub-workflow resolution: `subworkflow: 'js/ctx.request.body.type'` evaluates against the verified body, and the trigger's `namespace: 'stripe'` prefixes the result — so `body.type === 'invoice.paid'` lands at sub-workflow `stripe.invoice.paid`. Each event type gets its own handler workflow, no switch statement needed.
